x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: High discovery error rates indicate infrastructure that is being attempted but failing to discover. These CIs remain stale or absent from the CMDB, creating gaps in Now Assist context.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Investigate discovery errors via discovery_log_list.do. Common causes: missing credentials, network connectivity issues, MID Server misconfiguration. Resolve credential gaps first — uncredentialed CIs remain stale or absent, creating Now Assist ITOM context gaps.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c4a
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[High discovery error rates indicate infrastructure that is being attempted but failing to discover. These CIs remain stale or absent from the CMDB, creating gaps in Now Assist context.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Discovery Error Rate</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addDaysUTC(-90);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('discovery_status');
    gaTotal.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No discovery runs in last 90 days',
            finding: 'No discovery runs found in the last 90 days. Discovery error rate cannot be assessed — configure and run discovery first.'
        };
    }

    var gaErrors = new GlideAggregate('discovery_status');
    gaErrors.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaErrors.addQuery('state', 'IN', 'Error,Failed');
    gaErrors.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaErrors.query();
    var errors = gaErrors.next() ? parseInt(gaErrors.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((errors / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of discovery runs errored in last 90 days (' + errors + ' of ' + total + ')';

    if (pct <= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Discovery error rate is ' + pct + '% (last 90 days). Low error rate means Now Assist ITOM has reliable, current CI data to work with.'
        };
    } else if (pct <= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Discovery error rate is ' + pct + '% (last 90 days, target: ≤5%). Recurring errors leave CI gaps that reduce Now Assist ITOM context accuracy.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Discovery error rate is ' + pct + '% (last 90 days). High error rate means large portions of infrastructure are not being discovered — Now Assist ITOM AI analysis will have significant blind spots.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>ITOM</module>
<number>CHK0005983</number>
<order>40</order>
<remediation_guidance>Investigate discovery errors via discovery_log_list.do. Common causes: missing credentials, network connectivity issues, MID Server misconfiguration. Resolve credential gaps first — uncredentialed CIs remain stale or absent, creating Now Assist ITOM context gaps.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>4203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c4a</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
